title: Basic HR level Questions for job interviews
author: Priya
content:
Fresher’s HR Quest  - Career Insiders 

 • Introduce yourself to HR 

 ~ My name is Priya .I have done my schooling from CBSE board and pass with good grades.I am B.Tech graduate in Electronics and communication engineering. My learning from my past made me skilled in different languages.I know C,C+ +,Java, php,html/css/js,dbms,git and I have utilized these skills in some of my projects that made me adept in handling any advance project for my corporate life.I have also done some trainings and internship to make me proficient in the skills i have acquired so far. I have done my internship from Oracle in Java. Apart from my studies i also have interest in other activities like – cooking , singing , vlogging.These are few highlights about my profile and I will work even more harder to acquire new skills and enhance my skillset once I started my corporate journey. 

 • SWOT analysis

 ~ Strength : 

1.Competitive – I am Competitive by nature.From my student life , I have always tried to be a good performer to be in good eyes of my faculties and fellow mates. and I will utilise this quality even in my future journey to work for my company with heart and sole and make it a top level firm among all its rival companies. And I think if we have that spirit to compare ourselves with others in good terms than it could be beneficial for us to make us more productive in our work and also make some improvement in us internally from different aspects that could be our personality traits, our mental adaptability,in articulating and verbalising with different peoples. 

 2.Fraternal – Others’ financial status do not impact me personally in the way I interact with them.I treat everyone alike even if you are not financially well – off.I never discriminate among anyone based on their financial status,skin color or social background. For me every person is a persona of god.And I think humanity and mankind is a biggest form of worship.If you are disrespecting someone than you are insulting your idol to whom you worship daily. If i talk about me than even i treat my house maid/watchmen respectfully and consider them next to my parents.I give them the same love and respect that I have for my parents . 

 3.Adaptive – I can adjust myself in every environment irrespective of how hard or tough it is. I have made myself as such to adapt in every difficult situation and deal with it actively. When we join any organization than we take a pledge to work for the organization and stand by them in every difficult  circumstances.So,whenever I will work for my organization I would do it with my full dedication and determination and will leave a lasting impression of my work in my workplace. 

 Can you give any instance from your past that shows you are Adaptive? 

~ Once I went for a hiking in Shimla.It was too cold there and i didn’t have any of my winter accessories that every hiker carries.But I manage to keep myself warm by making canopy out of plants’ leaves and timber when others were using tents made of plastic sheets or fiber. Once I participated in an art Competition in my school and one of my group mate couldn’t make up to the competition.It was quite hard for us to do all designing,coloring ,labeling everything in a short time span . But we all manage to do things in a very caliberated manner to complete the task in the assigned time. And we were lucky enough that our art form was selected and we were rewarded a beautiful memento with a huge round of applause.

 4.Opportunistic – I know how to take the best use of my time.I never waste my time doing nothing. If any opportunity comes to me I never let it go empty handed.Just recently I was getting ready for a party when I got the invite to join 1 NGO’s league which was to happen on the same day .I manage my time to attend the NGO’s forum and also got recognition of being a prime member of that committee.So,I grab this opportunity of becoming a premium member of NGO and also attended the party by utilizing my time appropriately. 

 ~ Weakness : 

1.Less Communicative 

 2.Compliant and obliging – It’s hard for me to say no when somebody ask for help.Due to which sometimes others take undue advantage of my lenient behavior and take me for granted. 

 3.Short tempered – I turn aggressive when somebody doubt my intelligence. I give more importance to my work than other intra-personal affairs.I always remains serious in adding value to my work to make it more noticeable and proclaimed. 

4.Indecisive – I think a lot when I have to take any decision by myself. So,I seek others’ advice in making decisions and come to conclusion. And due to my such uncertain behavior others sometimes create perception of mine as very incompetent or  inexperienced in handling the situation.

 ~ Opportunity : 

 ~ Threat : 

1.Fear of rejection – I fear of getting rejected for the work in which I dedicate my golden hours to ccomplish it and worked much harder to make it achievable. 

2.Building trust and rapport – Maintain a good rapport of your work infront of your seniors and win their trust is very important when you are working in an organization.And we never want to lost that credibility and undermine trust of our  employer  for ourselves.If I lost that trust and my boss started being skeptic of my work than it would be a biggest fear for me. 

 • Why should I hire you?                         

                         or 

 How you would be an asset to our company if we hire you? 

 ~ I’m hard working,determined in achieving my goals.And my perseverance and dedication in delivering any task describe my sincerity and attentiveness towards my work.Whenever someone ask me for work ,I do it whole-heartedly and never let anyone down with my work performance. If you give me a chance to prove myself than i would portray myself as an active, upstanding   employee with my work and ability. 

 • Your salary expectation . 

 ~ After my selection,this will be my 1st step to work for an organization. And for me my work is more important than concerning how much I am paid.And for a fresher, their work is quantify with the skills they gained and the learning they acquired.So, I would be satisfied with whatever salary i get. 

 • Why you opt for this post/position ? 

 ~ I think no work or post is less- valued.Every work has its importance. But why I want to work for this post because I feel by working for this post I can give my career a good start. And also I have worked a lot in this field in the past.So, If I get a chance to work under this post I could work quite effectively to meet the end goals and do something productive for the company. 

• Why you want to work with this company ? 

 ~ This company has a good market value with high growth and turnover. And it majorly deals in app support and management, service acquisition to other tech firms,product delivery, client facing task.So,I think expertise in my area is well aligned with company’s roles and responsibilities.and I have always been interested to work for such service/product based companies where employees can get a good exposure to learn and develop their skills and get trained in their respective domain. 

 • WHERE do you see yourself in 5 years ? 

 ~ I would want to see myself at a place where I can find myself stable socially, financially as well as professionally. And from company’s view my position should be such where I can take important decisions for the company and could stand for it in making it grow marginally well. 

 • How will you handle a high priority task if given a senior management role ? 

 ~ There are many roles and responsibilities in a senior management role.If I have to work under some high profile role than I would remain highly interactive with all members of my staff and will pro- actively deal with their queries to find a solution.And I think a person is known by their work not with their position or name. So,if I have to work as a lead role player than I will treat all my employees like my family and will give equal share in handling of the work by being an observant and responsible member of my company. 

 • Your biggest achievement. 

 ~ From academic view my biggest achievement is that i have always been a consistently good performer throughout my student life and have always tried to retain that position by my hardwork. And if I talk in general terms than 

 • Anytime when you are highly disappointed and not satisfied with the outcome. 

 ~ There are always some moments in everyone ‘s life which do not live up to their expectations and they regret for that.I also faced many downfalls in my life which are inconsolable for me even today. Like while I was giving interviews for my 1st job than I got offer from 2 companies and I feel that  I would have been in a better place if I had accepted job offer of that company because it was giving me the role which I aspired for . though the pay was not that enough but by accepting job proposal of that company i could have got a better edge to start my corporate journey.

 • Can you work under pressure ? 

 ~ I never take my work as a burdan for me.and if I am in an environment where I have to work down the line to meet end goals than no matter what I will try to fulfill it by leaving an undeter mark of my work in my workplace. And if I have to work Under pressure than I will segment my work optimally to accomplish it and will make my effort count infront of my employer and co-ordinates. 

 • Your role model                              

                                 or 

 who inspire you in your life and why? 

 ~ I influenced by every successful person who has done something in their career which is impressive and worth  mentioning. And we get motivated when we see others doing something good in their life.For me my source of motivation is every legendary icon who set themselves as a guiding principle for all of us to learn something from them and be successful.And personally I admire Dr. APJ Abdul kalam a lot and look up to him because he was the man who achieved a great success in his lifespan as a scientist ,a politician or as an honorary scholar in big universities. 

 • Tell me about a difficult moment of your time and how you experienced it 

 ~ There are many such moments which were unreasonably tougher for me to get through them.But whenever I face any hard circumstances i keep myself composed and pacify myself in every strenuous situation. One moment I remember when I went on a family trip than my father’s wallet got stolen and we were out of cash.But than a gentleman helped us and we made a hassle free journey back to our home. 

 • Tell me an incident of your time when you face some difficulties to get over it but u learned something from that course of time . 

 ~ I remember 1 time when I was travelling at a place alone for sightseeing and there was no detour or navigator to locate me my current destination and it was an internet free zone.And that was a tough journey of my life .From that journey I realised that we should never be so condescending even though we are well associated with that place .we still need a guide to correct us whenever and whereever we are wrong. 

 • Are you a good time manager ? 

 ~ I utilise my time very efficiently and always remain punctual of my time. We say that time once gone ,gone forever so I be mindful of that to not waste a single minute of my time and take best use of it. In my real life where ever I am right now it is all with my right management of time and i imparted my time and energy to streamline my workflow by maintaining a close tie in  between my personal and professional work . 1 instance I could remember when I were to attend a meeting in office .So,I plan my roster for that day very pre-hand in advance to not face any last moment rush.I organised every circular ,set up agenda and all key things in a very orderly manner and I dropped in at the meeting in the right hours to devote my time and energy to successfully wrap up the meeting within the specified timeframe.

Important HR and Managerial Interview Tips

  • Maintain confidence and speak clearly during HR and managerial rounds.
  • Use practical examples while answering scenario based and behavioral questions.
  • Prepare answers for strengths, weaknesses, leadership and teamwork questions beforehand.
  • Avoid giving overly negative answers about previous companies or managers.
  • Use professional communication and maintain positive body language during interviews.
  • For managerial interviews, focus on leadership, conflict resolution and decision making abilities.
  • While answering behavioral questions, use the STAR method — Situation, Task, Action and Result.
  • Research the company and job role before appearing for HR interviews.
  • Practice self introduction and project explanation multiple times before the interview.
  • Be honest in your answers instead of using memorized responses.
